name: I.CERAM SA
summary: I.CERAM SA designs, manufactures, and markets alumina-based ceramic implants in France and internationally. It offers implants for various joints of the human body, including skull, shoulder, spine, hip, tibia, ankle, foot, and thorax, as well as osteosynthesis products. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Limoges, France. I.CERAM SA is a subsidiary of Investissement D√É¬©veloppement.
